ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "setname" TEXT /* Set name for the game */,
  "name" TEXT /* Title of the game */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the game was released (e.g., World, Japan, USA) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number or revision of the game */,
  "alternative" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the game is an alternative version */,
  "parent_title" TEXT /* Title of the parent game (if applicable) */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform the game was released on (e.g., Capcom CPS-1, Capcom CPS-0) */,
  "series" TEXT /* Series the game belongs to (e.g., 19XX) */,
  "homebrew" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the game is a homebrew title */,
  "bootleg" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the game is a bootleg */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the game was released */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the game */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the game (e.g., Shooter - Flying Vertical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the game */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the game's cover or screenshot */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to a gameplay video */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the game's popularity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date the game entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_series FOREIGN KEY ("series") REFERENCES series ("series_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_platform FOREIGN KEY ("platform") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* The year the manufacturer was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* The location of the manufacturer's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* The manufacturer's official website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the category */,
  "parent_category" INTEGER /* The parent category if it exists (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the platform */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the manufacturer that produced the platform (foreign key to `manufacturers`) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_platforms_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the series */,
  "parent_series" INTEGER /* The parent series if it exists (for hierarchical series) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., contributor, moderator, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for user authentication */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* The user's account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* The number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* The number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* The number of users who found the rating helpful */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* The number of users who found the rating unhelpful */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was written */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* The number of users who found the comment helpful */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* The number of users who found the comment unhelpful */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the attribute belongs to */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., linebreak1, resolution) */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date the attribute was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_attributes_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_platform_attributes" (
  "platform_attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform attribute */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the platform attribute belongs to */,
  "platform_attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform attribute (e.g., rotation) */,
  "platform_attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the platform attribute */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date the platform attribute was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_platform_attributes_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
